---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Voyara — Travel, Tours, Visas & Study Abroad"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.full-bleed .hero}
::: {.hero-inner}
[Travel · Tours · Visas · Tickets · Study]{.eyebrow}

# The world, [planned beautifully]{}.

::: {.lead}
Voyara is your single window for tour planning, visa processing, flight tickets, and study-abroad guidance — handled by people who actually travel.
:::

::: {.hero-cta}
[Plan my trip](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
[Explore services](services.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-ghost}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.section-head}
[What we do]{.eyebrow}

## Everything your journey needs

Five core services, one trusted team — so you never juggle five different agencies again.
:::

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🗺️
:::
### Tour Planning
Custom itineraries for solo travelers, families, and groups — from weekend escapes to multi-country adventures.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🛂
:::
### Visa Assistance
End-to-end visa processing: document checklists, application filing, appointment booking, and interview prep.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
✈️
:::
### Flight Tickets
Competitive fares on domestic and international routes, with flexible date options and 24/7 rebooking support.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🎓
:::
### Study Abroad
University shortlisting, admissions, student visas, and pre-departure support for studying overseas.
:::

::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🏨
:::
### Stays & Transfers
Vetted hotels, airport transfers, and local experiences bundled into your itinerary.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.full-bleed .band}
::: {.band-inner}
::: {.stat}
[12+]{.num}
[Years of experience]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[40+]{.num}
[Countries covered]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[9k+]{.num}
[Happy travelers]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[98%]{.num}
[Visa success rate]{.lbl}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.section-head}
[Featured]{.eyebrow}

## Tours people love

A taste of what we put together. Every trip is fully customizable.
:::

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d6e6e,#0a5454);"}
[Bestseller]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Bali Escape
[7 days · Indonesia]{.meta}

Beaches, temples, and rice terraces with private transfers throughout.

[from \$1,090]{.price}
:::
:::

::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#e2734a,#c85a33);"}
[Popular]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Türkiye Highlights
[9 days · Istanbul + Cappadocia]{.meta}

Hot-air balloons, bazaars, and Bosphorus cruises in one seamless route.

[from \$1,450]{.price}
:::
:::

::: {.tour-card}
::: {.thumb style="background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,#122a2e,#0d6e6e);"}
[New]{.tag}
:::
::: {.body}
### Swiss Alps Rail
[6 days · Switzerland]{.meta}

Scenic train journeys through Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zermatt.

[from \$1,980]{.price}
:::
:::
:::

::: {style="text-align:center; margin-top:2.5rem;"}
[See all tours](tours.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-ghost}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.section-head}
[How it works]{.eyebrow}

## From idea to boarding pass

:::

::: {.steps}
::: {.step}
#### Tell us your plan
Share your destination, dates, budget, and what kind of trip you want.
:::
::: {.step}
#### Get a tailored proposal
We build an itinerary with flights, stays, visas, and costs — clearly laid out.
:::
::: {.step}
#### We handle the paperwork
Visa filing, ticketing, and bookings are all managed by your dedicated advisor.
:::
::: {.step}
#### You travel, stress-free
Go enjoy it. We stay reachable 24/7 for anything that comes up.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cta-banner}
## Ready when you are
Tell us where you want to go — we'll take care of the rest.

[Start planning](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
:::

<script src="assets/js/reveal.js"></script>
